input.task: Materialize deterministic DAG task tree for retrieval pipeline authority remediation
scope: Runtime must detect active build changes deterministically and refresh without requiring MCP restart
Observability surfaces must align to source-backed schemas and expose no phantom or null placeholder fields
Build execution results must prove CUDA execution truthfully and report fallback behavior truthfully
Vector integrity validation must cover every metadata field written by the builder
Historical task documents must not surface as current LAW or current-truth retrieval evidence
A deterministic test surface must cover runtime reload, observability parity, build truthfulness, integrity drift, and MCP versus CLI parity

task_tree.description: Lock deterministic active-build detection and runtime reload behavior so MCP and CLI serve the same promoted retrieval state without manual restart.
retrieval_queries: semantic_search_server canonical retrieval runtime cache persistent process
retrieval runtime stale build after promotion mcp parity cli
task_tree.verification_requirement: A promoted build becomes visible to both CLI and long-lived MCP retrieval immediately under the same active-build contract, with no manual restart and no stale runtime state.

task_tree.description: Align observability schemas to the real upstream artifact fields and remove null or phantom keys from retrieval status, dependency health, and model health surfaces.
task_tree.verification_requirement: Every observability field is either backed by a single repo-visible source field or removed, and no active observability file emits null placeholders for authoritative values.

task_tree.description: Make build results truthful about CUDA execution and fallback behavior so device and fallback PASS states are evidence-backed rather than synthetic.
retrieval_queries: build execution result cuda proof fallback reporting
staging verification device_check no_fallback_used retrieval build
task_tree.verification_requirement: Build execution records prove actual CUDA execution or fail closed, and fallback reporting is derived from measured behavior rather than hard-coded PASS values.

task_tree.description: Define and enforce a canonical vector metadata contract so integrity validation covers every stored collection and record metadata field.
retrieval_queries: index_artifact_integrity vector metadata parity collection metadata
vector metadata contract integrity drift retrieval
task_tree.verification_requirement: The builder-written metadata key set and the integrity-validated metadata key set are identical, and drift in any stored metadata field fails integrity verification.

task_tree.description: Separate historical narrative from current authority so retrieval cannot surface stale task documents as current LAW or current-truth evidence.
retrieval_queries: build_vector_index classify actual_truth determined_tasks law source_type
search_code build_output_entry retrieval evidence stale narrative
historical task documents current truth retrieval authority
task_tree.verification_requirement: Historical task documents are demoted, labeled, or excluded so retrieval evidence cannot present stale narrative as active LAW or active current truth.

task_tree.description: Add deterministic end-to-end and parity verification for runtime reload, observability alignment, build truthfulness, vector integrity drift, and MCP versus CLI behavior.
retrieval_queries: retrieval tests promotion reload parity integrity drift mcp cli
observability parity tests retrieval health schema
build truthfulness tests cuda fallback retrieval
task_tree.verification_requirement: The deterministic test surface proves slices A through E under fresh-process and long-lived-process execution, including promotion reload, observability parity, integrity drift failure, and MCP versus CLI parity.
